statement: In every magma, Equation 2833 (`x = ((y * z) * (w * z)) * z`) implies Equation 1461 (`x = (x * y) * (z * (x * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0538
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op w z)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op x y) (op z (op x x)))
